gardens.subtitle: Sky Gardens

s1.title: Regional Value Appreciation
s1.desc: Continuously multiplying real estate value due to completed infrastructure projects and intense demand for the region.

s2.title: Targeted Amortization
s2.desc: Return on investment rate significantly below the Turkish average due to the synergy of commercial areas, mall, and residence mixed-use concept.

s3.title: Citizenship Threshold
s3.desc: Full compliance with the Turkish Citizenship by Investment program for foreign investors with a transparent legal process guarantee.

a3.title: International Brand Assurance
a3.desc: The reliability of the Luxera brand in the international arena, the project's high material standards, and on-time delivery guarantee provide a peaceful investment process by minimizing risks.

a4.title: High Rental Yield
a4.desc: Due to intense demand from plaza employees, airline personnel, and expat managers in the region, the vacancy rate is at a minimum while the foreign currency-based rental income potential is maximized.

cta.title: Professional Investment Consultancy
cta.desc: Every investor's profile and expectation is different. Our sales team is waiting to create the most suitable unit options and personalized payment plans for your budget, citizenship goals, and maturity plans.

cookies.title: Cookie
cookies.subtitle: Information about cookies used on our website
cookies.p1: As the Luxera Towers website, we use cookies to offer our visitors a better user experience, analyze site usage, and present personalized content.
cookies.p2: Cookies are small text files stored on your device or network server via your browser by the websites you visit.

l1.text: These are cookies absolutely necessary for the website to function properly and perform basic functions.

l2.text: These are cookies that help us analyze how visitors use our website and improve site performance (e.g., Google Analytics).

l3.text: These are cookies used to present advertisements and campaigns tailored to your interests.

cookies.p3: You can customize your cookie preferences by changing your browser settings. We would like to remind you that if you disable cookies, some features of our website may not function properly.

kvkk.title: GDPR
kvkk.subtitle: Clarification Text under the Personal Data Protection Law
kvkk.p2: Your collected personal data is processed by our company for the purposes of sales and marketing of our real estate projects, creating special campaigns for you, conducting customer satisfaction research, and carrying out communication activities.
kvkk.h2: 2. To Whom and For What Purpose Processed Personal Data Can Be Transferred
kvkk.h3: 3. Rights of the Personal Data Owner

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: Privacy Policy and Terms of Use
privacy.p1: This privacy policy explains how personal information of users visiting the Luxera Towers website is collected, used, and protected. By using our site, you are deemed to have accepted this policy.
privacy.p2: Information such as your name, surname, email, and phone number that you provide when filling out forms on our site (contact form, e-newsletter registration, etc.) is used solely to respond to you, inform you about our campaigns, and improve our service quality.
privacy.p3: All personal data you share with us is stored on secure servers and is never shared with third parties or institutions except for legal obligations. Industry-standard security measures are taken for your data security.

f1.title: 87 Luxury Stores
f1.desc: World-famous brands, prestigious designer boutiques, and exclusive retail stores are waiting for you as an extension of your personal wardrobe, just an elevator ride away.

f2.title: Fitness & SPA
f2.desc: A fitness center equipped with the most modern international equipment for a healthy life and a luxury SPA area with thermal comfort where you can relieve the day's stress.

f3.title: Gastronomy Culture
f3.desc: Turn every meal into an unforgettable experience with gourmet restaurants inspired by Michelin-star vision chefs and third-wave coffee shops.

f4.title: 24/7 VIP Service
f4.desc: Experience 5-star hotel comfort in the privacy of your own home with private valet, bellboy, and professional assistant (concierge) services.

intro.title: An Architecture of Life Beyond Boundaries
intro.p1: Instead of keeping up with the rhythm of the city, shape the city's rhythm around yourself. Luxera Towers is not just a residential area; it's a massive, self-sustaining ecosystem where architecture, nature, and commercial dynamism dance in perfect harmony.

gallery.title: Social Living Areas
gallery.subtitle: Every moment of life is privileged with pools, green terraces, and relaxation areas.

value.p2: The location at the intersection of metro, metrobus, E-5, and TEM connections makes the region privileged for both living and investment.
value.metroDesc: Gunesli Metro Station is within walking distance.

section.title: Center of the Business World

f1.title: Travel & Transfer
f1.desc: VIP airport transfers, private jet and helicopter charter, hotel reservations.

f2.title: Event Management
f2.desc: VIP ticket procurement and box reservations for concerts, theater, and special events.

f3.title: Private Assistance
f3.desc: Restaurant reservations, flower and gift delivery, dry cleaning organization.

f4.title: 24/7 Communication
f4.desc: Instant service with a single phone call or via our mobile app.

extras.title: A Personalized Life Assistant
extras.p1: Our concierge team takes care of the small but time-consuming details of daily life on your behalf. So you can focus only on what's important.
extras.p2: From a business dinner reservation to planning an international trip, from a special gift delivered to your home to last-minute ticket procurement; a single request is enough.
extras.b2: VIP airport transfer and travel organization
extras.b3: Dry cleaning, flower, and gift delivery

cta.title: Get Your Time Back
cta.desc: Contact us to get closely acquainted with the Concierge privilege and Luxera Towers lifestyle.

fitness.desc: Show your body and soul the care they deserve. In the center of the city but far from its stress; our gym equipped with the latest technology and our luxury SPA center to help you purify are waiting for you.

f2.title: Indoor Swimming Pool
f2.desc: Four-season heated and spacious indoor swimming pool.

f3.title: Premium SPA Center
f3.desc: Turkish bath, sauna, steam room, and personalized massage therapies.

f4.title: Private Trainer Support
f4.desc: One-on-one (Personal Trainer) fitness consultancy and pilates studios.

extras.title: An Oasis for Your Body and Soul
extras.p1: Whether to start the day energetically or to relieve the day's stress; whatever your need, everything you are looking for is just a few floors below your home.
extras.p2: After the heated indoor pool, Turkish bath, sauna, and steam room; experience total purification with personalized massage therapies.
extras.b3: Turkish bath, sauna, and steam room
extras.b4: One-on-one personal trainer and pilates studio

cta.title: Healthy Living Under Your Door
cta.desc: Book an appointment to experience the Fitness & SPA privilege and Luxera Towers lifestyle on-site.

housekeeping.desc: The perfection of your home is the most important detail of luxury living. We crown residence comfort with a cleaning and maintenance service at 5-star hotel standards, keeping your living spaces spotless at all times.

f1.title: Daily / Weekly Cleaning
f1.desc: Detailed general house cleaning and arrangement planned according to your request.

f2.title: Dry Cleaning & Ironing
f2.desc: Door-to-door dry cleaning service for your clothes and home textile products.

f3.title: Deep Hygiene
f3.desc: Periodically applied disinfection, sofa washing, and carpet care.

f4.title: Plant and Terrace Care
f4.desc: Professional care of your terrace, winter garden, and living room plants.

extras.title: A Home Always Ready to Host Guests
extras.p1: The order and hygiene of your home are the quietest but most decisive detail of luxury living. Our housekeeping team keeps your living spaces at 5-star hotel meticulousness.
extras.p2: From daily cleaning to dry cleaning, from terrace plant care to deep hygiene; you just enjoy it, leave the rest to us.
extras.b1: Planned daily or weekly general cleaning
extras.b3: Periodic disinfection, sofa, and carpet care
extras.b4: Maintenance of terrace, winter garden, and living room plants

cta.title: Pristine Living Spaces
cta.desc: Contact us to get closely acquainted with the Housekeeping privilege and Luxera Towers lifestyle.

lounge.desc: Exclusive lounge and club areas designed for you to host your guests, hold business meetings, or just enjoy a quiet coffee.

f1.title: Business Lounge
f1.desc: Meeting rooms, high-speed internet, and quiet working areas equipped with office amenities.

f2.title: Cigar & Wine Club
f2.desc: An elegant space decorated with special climate cabinets and comfortable leather armchairs.

f3.title: Private Dining Room
f3.desc: Private dining rooms supported by chef service where you can host your special guests.

f4.title: Game & Cinema Room
f4.desc: Private cinema hall and entertainment areas equipped with latest tech game consoles.

extras.title: Your New Social Networking Area
extras.p1: Luxera Club Lounge was designed as an exclusive platform that brings together an elite community and meets your business and entertainment needs.
extras.p2: Whether closing an important business deal, hosting a crowded dinner, or watching a movie with your family; all possibilities are reserved for you.
extras.b1: Fully equipped meeting and business lounge
extras.b3: Private dining room with VIP chef service
extras.b4: Private cinema and high-tech game room

cta.title: The Privilege of Being Exclusive
cta.desc: Book an appointment to experience the Lounge privilege and Luxera Towers lifestyle on-site.

security.desc: Your peace of mind is our priority. We offer a safe and peaceful living environment with smart building technologies, a 24/7 active security team, and multi-layered access control systems.

f1.title: 24/7 Security Team
f1.desc: A professional and trained security team constantly monitoring the project site.

f2.title: CCTV Camera System
f2.desc: Continuous monitoring of all common areas, parking lots, and environmental perimeters.

f3.title: Smart Access Control
f3.desc: Card, fingerprint, or mobile app access systems at building entrances and elevators.

f4.title: Fire & Emergency
f4.desc: Advanced fire detection, extinguishing systems, and emergency evacuation protocols.

extras.title: Invisible Shield, Absolute Peace
extras.p1: Our security systems work seamlessly in the background without disturbing your comfort and privacy.
extras.p2: With our smart home infrastructure, you can manage the security of your home via your mobile phone, define temporary access codes for your guests, and track everything instantly.
extras.b2: Comprehensive CCTV monitoring and recording system
extras.b4: Mobile integrated guest and delivery tracking

cta.title: Live in Peace
cta.desc: Contact us to get closely acquainted with our Security privileges and the Luxera Towers lifestyle.

valet.desc: Say goodbye to parking stress. Our professional valet team meets your vehicle at the door and brings it safely to the lobby door when you leave.

f1.title: 24/7 Valet Service
f1.desc: Uninterrupted vehicle reception and delivery service whenever you arrive or leave.

f2.title: Mobile Request
f2.desc: Ability to request your vehicle in advance via the resident portal without waiting.

f3.title: Guest Valet
f3.desc: Privileged valet service for your visitors.

f4.title: Safe Parking
f4.desc: Your vehicle is safely parked in the closed parking lot reserved for you.

extras.title: Time is Your Most Valuable Asset
extras.p1: You don't need to waste time looking for a parking spot at Luxera Towers. Our valet team meets you at the main entrance and parks your vehicle safely.
extras.p2: When you are leaving, you can call your vehicle to the door with a single click via our mobile application and get directly on the road without waiting.
extras.b2: Quick vehicle call via mobile app
extras.b3: Safe indoor parking and VIP guest hosting

cta.title: Comfort Starting at the Door
cta.desc: Book an appointment to experience the Valet privilege and Luxera Towers lifestyle on-site.

f1.title: Smart Home Technologies
f1.desc: Control lighting, climate, and security with a single touch from your tablet or smartphone.

f2.title: Premium Materials
f2.desc: First-class natural stone, imported parquet, and custom-designed kitchen cabinets.

f3.title: Panoramic Views
f3.desc: Floor-to-ceiling windows, 3.20m ceiling height, and uninterrupted city views.

f4.title: Spacious Balconies & Terraces
f4.desc: Large balconies that breathe with the city and integrate with sky gardens.
